name_cn:
CELIN-E New Series|
CLAUDE All-over TRIOMPHE Denim Chain Shoulder Bag
New Limited Edition Denim TRIOMPHE Chain Shoulder Bag 💙 New release of the denim series chain shoulder bag~Denim fabric + Triomphe print pattern~paired with a silver Triomphe metal lock, it has great texture. A small and exquisite bag shape, versatile for daily wear without looking out of place. Full marks for high-class feel~A must-have shoulder bag for cool girls👏
Style No.: 115202 Denim Print
Size: 20.5 X 11.5 X 4cm (with original packaging)
